summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Premium Sphere e-commerce application. Backend API testing shows 100% success rate (18/18 tests passed). Frontend testing shows excellent UI functionality with proper authentication, cart operations, search/filtering, and admin panel access.
passed_tests: API root endpoint responds correctly
6 categories seeded and accessible via GET /api/categories
20 products seeded and accessible via GET /api/products
Product search functionality works (Netflix search returns results)
Category filtering works (Gaming category returns 4 products)
Single product retrieval works
Admin login with admin@premiumsphere.com / Admin@123
User registration creates new customer accounts
Authentication properly blocks unauthenticated access
Admin stats endpoint works for authenticated admin
Admin can create/delete products and categories
Homepage loads with Premium Sphere branding and hero banner
Product carousels display 29+ products across categories
Search functionality works from navbar
Category filtering works on search page
Product detail pages load correctly
Cart functionality: add items, view cart, remove items
Checkout process creates orders and redirects to orders page
User registration form works correctly
Admin panel accessible with proper statistics display
Navbar elements (search, cart, user menu) function properly

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (minor script error in registration test, but UI works correctly)
